calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Advanced From Feb-24-10 To Jan-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Text Ruling

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Continued To Jan-22-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Continued To Jan-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Colleen Wiley (Trustee). Robert Cross for Derek Lewis (Beneficiary).

Mr. Bear stated that negotiations were going very well but not completed, that they planned to stipulate to an order modifying the trust and requested a continuance. The matter was continued to January 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Continued To Jan-15-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cross for Derek Lewis (Beneficiary). David Baer for Colleen Wiley (Trustee).

Mr. Baer stated that they needed more time to hold discussions and try to resolve the matter. The matter was continued to January 15, 2010 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court also directed Counsel to make sure all of the Beneficiaries were in on the discussions. Mr. Baer stated that he filed consents and waivers of notice for each of the Beneficiaries.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time And Specially Setting Hearing On Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms Due To Changed Circumstances And Uneconomically Low Trust Principal Pc 1203; 9611
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
